summary: Iteration 79 - Tested Zustand state management migration. All 7 features verified: Login flow (authStore), Dark mode toggle (uiStore), POS page branch selector (branchStore), Dashboard page, Suppliers page, Expenses page, Sales page - all loading correctly with branch data from Zustand stores.

console_warnings.warning: HTML nesting warning: <tr> cannot be a child of <span>
console_warnings.note: This is a React hydration warning from development tooling wrapper spans, not a functional issue

critical_code_review_comments: Zustand stores correctly implemented with persist middleware for auth and UI stores
authStore properly handles login, logout, hydration from localStorage
branchStore fetches branches once and caches in state, avoiding redundant API calls
uiStore toggles dark mode and applies class to document.documentElement correctly
All pages (POS, Dashboard, Suppliers, Expenses, Sales) correctly import from centralized stores index
DashboardLayout correctly uses all three stores for user info, dark mode, and branch data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Zustand state management migration fully tested and working. Three stores created: authStore (login/logout/user with persist), branchStore (branch fetching/caching), uiStore (dark mode/sidebar with persist). All key pages updated to use these stores instead of local state and direct localStorage access. Dashboard tour overlay appears on first login - click 'Skip Tour' to dismiss.

authStore.user_display: WORKING - User name 'SSC Admin' displayed from store
authStore.auth_persistence: WORKING - Stays logged in after page refresh and navigation

branchStore.pos_page_selector: WORKING - Branch dropdown populated with 6 options
branchStore.suppliers_page: WORKING - Branch data available for supplier assignments
branchStore.expenses_page: WORKING - Branch dropdown in expense form
branchStore.sales_page: WORKING - Branch-wise monthly sales summary displayed

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real backend calls
